## Summary

Describe the change and the intended clinical or operational impact.

## Verification

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Integration impact assessed
- [ ] Performance impact assessed
- [ ] Cybersecurity impact assessed
- [ ] Changelog updated if the release surface changed
- [ ] Risk register updated if hazard posture changed
- [ ] Traceability matrix updated if requirements changed
- [ ] README or contributor docs updated if install, packaging, or release behavior changed

## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Requirements are clear and testable
- [ ] Failure modes are handled safely
- [ ] Logs and audit trail do not leak PHI
- [ ] No hard-coded secrets or unsafe defaults
- [ ] Rollback path is defined
